title: Converting SQL Queries to Query Expressions for NoSQL Database
scenario: Translate SQL queries to equivalent query expressions for a NoSQL database. Assume the database schema is known. The output should be in JSON format, with specific field names and data types. The target LLM output should demonstrate an understanding of querying NoSQL databases and the ability to map SQL syntax to NoSQL query expressions.
constraints: Must include field name and data type for each attribute
Must use the correct query syntax for the NoSQL database

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output correctly maps SQL syntax to NoSQL query expressions.
Check if the output includes field names and data types for each attribute.
Check if the output uses the correct query syntax for the NoSQL database.
